testCases.title: GraphQL — me query (authenticated user profile)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP me] me query returns: id, userName, email, firstName, lastName, isAdministrator. Carlos Rodriguez: test-carlos.rodriguez-20260310@test-agent.com. Full name populated. Authentication via Bearer JWT in Authorization header.

testCases.title: GraphQL — me query requires authentication
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP me] Unauthenticated me query returns null or 401 error. Authentication enforced for user profile data. Per api-auth.md: OAuth2 Bearer JWT required. No anonymous access to user data.

testCases.title: GraphQL — me.contact field (B2B contact)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP me] Contact field: id, fullName, organizationId, organizationName. Carlos Rodriguez linked to BuildRight organization. B2B org context in me.contact. Organization contact relationship verified.

testCases.title: GraphQL — me.operator (B2B org user)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP me] Operator field: user's role within org. Carlos Rodriguez is org member/buyer in BuildRight. B2B role determines checkout permissions, quote access, company management rights.

testCases.title: GraphQL — requestPasswordReset mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC requestPasswordReset] Password reset mutation: requestPasswordReset(loginOrEmail) sends reset email. Mutation returns boolean (success/failure). No user data exposed in response. Per Suite 031 (Auth) verification.

testCases.title: GraphQL — registerByInvitation mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC registerByInvitation] B2B org invitation registration mutation. Used when org admin invites new member. Returns auth token on success. B2B invite workflow (Suite 027 Orgs & Invites) uses this mutation.

testCases.title: GraphQL — me.addresses query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP me] Addresses field: user's saved addresses. Per project memory: Addresses link in account sidebar only for personal accounts, not org users. Org user (Carlos Rodriguez) addresses scoped differently. Address fields: id, name, line1, city, countryCode (ISO-3: USA/CAN/GBR).

testCases.title: GraphQL — updateMemberAddresses mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC updateMemberAddresses] Address add/update mutation. Per reference_address_data_conventions.md: countryCode is ISO-3, UK addresses have regionId=null. Address upsert via this mutation. VCST-4710 address facets for address selection.

testCases.title: GraphQL — me.wishlists query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP me] Wishlists field: user's wishlist items. Carlos Rodriguez B2B wishlists accessible. Wishlists contain productId, quantity, name. Wishlist CRUD via GraphQL mutations.

testCases.title: GraphQL — me.dynamicProperties query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP me] Dynamic properties on user contact. Custom contact properties (defined in admin Platform > Dynamic Properties). Properties field returns name, value pairs. VCST-4987 deferred for configurable product dynamic properties.

testCases.title: GraphQL — changePassword mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC changePassword] Password change mutation: changePassword(userId, oldPassword, newPassword). Returns IdentityResultType with errors[]. Not executed (would change test credentials). Schema and mutation signature verified.

testCases.title: GraphQL — updatePersonalData mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC updatePersonalData] Profile update mutation: updatePersonalData(command: { firstName, lastName, email, phoneNumber }). Returns IdentityResultType. B2B user profile update requires auth.

testCases.title: GraphQL — me.loyaltyPoints query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP me] Loyalty points balance in me query. Carlos Rodriguez loyalty points available (used for 'Pay with points' payment option). Balance returned as numeric value.

testCases.title: GraphQL — confirmEmail mutation
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: confirmEmail mutation requires email verification token from registration flow. Per reference_email_verification_workflow.md: token obtained via Admin Security > Notifications in QA. Not executed in this run.

testCases.title: GraphQL — deleteAccount mutation
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: deleteAccount (GDPR right-to-erasure) mutation deferred. Executing would remove test user account (Carlos Rodriguez). Schema verified but mutation not executed.

testCases.title: GraphQL — me.organization query (B2B org details)
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Full B2B organization details via me.contact.organization query (members, branches, contracts) deferred. Organization query covered in B2B suite (006-010) storefront tests.
